step_rationale: Lipid phosphatase; endothelial barrier maintenance and mechanosensing.
mechanism: PLPP3 regulates lysophospholipid signaling and endothelial quiescence; critical for hemodynamic mechanosensing and endothelial stability.

references.title: Genetic variant at coronary artery disease and ischemic stroke locus 1p32.2 regulates endothelial responses to hemodynamics.
references.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
